title: lindsaea bakeri var. bakeri
intro: Lindsaea bakeri var. bakeri, also known as the Australian Tree Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Lindsaeaceae. It is native to Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used in herbal preparations, such as creams and ointments, to treat skin conditions and promote tissue repair.
